sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = (Current Equity × Optimal f) / Maximum Loss per Contract. Optimal f calculated from historical trade HPR data. Specific f value must be determined from backtested equity curves.

source_rule_text: Trade on a fixed fractional basis using optimal f value, which maximizes the ratio of potential gain to potential loss and converts daily equity changes to HPR for position sizing.
